text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan looks under the weather, so I send
her to the infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I sincerely apologize for the trouble. I shall lie
down for the time being...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I'm all too familiar with such surroundings. It
appears I'm to live my life against the backdrop
of various hospital rooms.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...That said, this time, I have someone waiting for
me to race again. I must recover fully.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What is this sensation? My body feels so light...
And?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My legs are brimming with power! I've never felt
like this before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
With these legs... I've no limits. I can run for as
long as I wish to!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I want to run! Everywhere and anywhere! And with
these legs...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It was but a fleeting dream. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It seems... dreams, too, can brighten one's mood
from time to time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps owing to some proper rest, Mejiro Ardan
seems to have returned to her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I wonder if it's possible to dream within dreams...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan has had plenty of rest, she
still doesn't seem to be feeling any better.
